main.description: A provenance-stamped, uncertainty-quantified EXTERNAL-MARKET valuation of one parcel, fused by kenchi from multiple independent authorities and cleared by the ProvenanceGovernor (G3 PROVENANCE-OR-SILENCE). EXCLUDES etzhayyim Land Trust inalienable holdings (G5; ADR-2605192245 — inalienable land has no market price). A parcel is a place, not a person (G6 NO-PII). rkey = sanitized parcel id.

parcel.description: Canonical parcel id (place, not person — G6 NO-PII; no owner linkage).

assetClass.description: ONLY external-market. Inalienable Land Trust / commons-asset access is NOT valued here (G5; toritate.commonsAssetAccess owns that as non-market STOCK).

valueUsd.description: Fused point estimate from recorded PRICE comps only, USD decimal string.

nComps.description: Independent recorded comps anchoring the point (G3: ≥3).

nAuthorities.description: Independent data authorities corroborating (G3/N8: ≥2; no single-source oracle).

license.description: Republication class of THIS record. NEVER 'raw'/'restricted' — ToS-restricted inputs publish derived-only (G4).

provenance.description: Receipts: sources/authorities/kinds/licenses that produced the number (G2 lineage).

authority.description: Independent provider (independence counted by authority, not source).
